name: computer-dynamics-v2
description: Computer Dynamics MSP Intranet — Next.js + TypeScript (legacy SQLite compatible)

scripts.dev:license: cd license_activation_system_new && set PYTHONUTF8=1&& set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8&& python license_api_server.py
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently -k -n web,security,license -c blue,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w @cd-v2/web" "npm run security:worker" "npm run dev:license"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cd-v2/database && npm run build -w @cd-v2/backup && npm run build -w @cd-v2/security && npm run build -w @cd-v2/web
